config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to insight.rapid7.com
2. Manage Platform → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Enter your region (us, eu, ca, etc.)

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your Insight Platform region: us, us2, us3, eu, ca, au, ap (default: us)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Rapid7 platform users to verify access is properly managed

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Rapid7 InsightVM has active vulnerability scans configured
